en: What money? A.C. said you had some dough for me.
ko: A.C.가 나한테 줄 돈이 있다고 했어.

en: Matter of fact, how much do I owe you?
A.C. said 10%. Too bad A.C. ain't in charge no more.
ko: A.C.가 더 이상 책임자가 아니라서 안타깝네.

en: What do you mean? He's upstairs taking a bath.
He'll call you when he gets out.
Hey, I'll tell you what I'm going to give you, snakes.
ko: 내가 너한테 줄 게 뭔지 말해줄게, 스네이크.

en: I'm going to give you to the count of 10
to get your ugly, yellow, no-good keister off my property
ko: 너의 못생긴, 노란, 쓸모없는 엉덩이를 내 재산에서 치워.

en: before I pop your guts full of lead. All right, Johnny, I'm sorry.
ko: 그렇지 않으면 너를 총으로 쏠 거야.
